title: Creamy Pasta Delight
description: A rich and indulgent pasta dish featuring a silky sauce made from milk and butter, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Pour in the milk and stir until the sauce thickens slightly, scraping the bottom of the pan to prevent lumps.
Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in the chopped parsley.
Drain the cooked pasta and return it to the pot.
Pour the silky sauce over the pasta and toss until well coated.
